feedback.title: Excellent Workshop
feedback.content: The workshop was very well organized and the instructors were knowledgeable

feedback.title: Good Content
feedback.content: Great information shared, would have liked more time for Q&A

feedback.title: Outstanding Leadership Session
feedback.content: This session provided valuable insights into CSR strategy

feedback.title: Great Summit
feedback.content: The networking opportunities were valuable, but venue could be improved

feedback.title: Inspiring and Engaging
feedback.content: Great speakers and diverse topics. Looking forward to next year!
